name: overseerr-mcp
description: Overseerr media requests via MCP tools with HTTP fallback. Search movies and TV shows, submit requests, and monitor failed requests.

overseerr_mcp_url.title: Overseerr MCP Server URL
overseerr_mcp_url.description: URL of the overseerr-mcp MCP server. Default http://localhost:6975 works if running via docker compose in this repo. Change if running on a different host or port.

overseerr_url.title: Overseerr Server URL
overseerr_url.description: Base URL of your Overseerr server, e.g. https://overseerr.example.com. No trailing slash.

overseerr_api_key.title: Overseerr API Key
overseerr_api_key.description: Overseerr API key. Found in Overseerr Settings → General → API Key.
